businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as official program of record for full military deployment. Selected for Golden Dome $185B missile defense software. Tools actively used in Iran war operations.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - rapid adoption programs for customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 6.6x S&P 500 IT sector avg (34x). 5x software sector avg (45x). Extreme premium persists

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS est. $1.22. Still 3x growth stock avg of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026E $7.40B. Iran war expansion may further accelerate defense AI demand

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-7x premium vs software sector avg 10-15x. Still in overvalued territory relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: -30.5% from 52-week high $207. Wyckoff analysis sees $135-140 support

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold but weak bounce momentum in downtrend

growthDrivers.title: Stellantis 5-Year Partnership Renewal & Expansion (3/30)
growthDrivers.description: Renewed partnership with world's 4th largest automaker. Proves Foundry enterprise AI expansion

growthDrivers.title: CNBC: Iran War Is Defense Tech Opportunity, Palantir Tools in Active Use (3/28)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon contracts worth billions already secured. CEO Karp confirmed real-time combat use. Houthi involvement expands demand

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril developing software for Trump admin's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Barchart: developing the 'core'

growthDrivers.title: Mizuho Reiterates Outperform $195 Target (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: Believes Palantir positioned for total revenue growth acceleration and margin expansion

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Full Military Adoption (Program of Record, 3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all military branches

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket AI Anti-Fraud Partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Vergence AI performing real-time trading surveillance and user behavior monitoring for Polymarket

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearances, Maven military adoption, Iran war combat verification. Moats money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Extremely high replacement costs
Top-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants
Real-time targeting use in Iran war. Houthi involvement expands demand
Rapid customer acquisition via AIP Bootcamps and Ontology data model ecosystem expansion

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Partnering with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platforms. Far behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Cannot match Ontology-level integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind in revenue scale and growth

recentNews.headline: Barchart: Palantir Developing the Core of Golden Dome. Buy Now?
recentNews.significance: Mizuho Securities reiterates Outperform $195 target. Revenue growth acceleration and margin expansion expected

recentNews.headline: TradingKey: PLTR Down 3.81% on 3/30, Insider Selling + Macro Pressure
recentNews.significance: Continuous March selling by Thiel and executives weighing on sentiment

recentNews.headline: Stellantis 5-Year Partnership Renewal and Expansion
recentNews.significance: Long-term partnership with 4th largest global automaker renewed. Foundry success story

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: Golden Dome Reshapes Defense Exposure and Valuation Debate
recentNews.significance: Could lead to long-term operations/maintenance contracts. Larger scope than Maven

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: Peter Thiel Sells Palantir; He May Regret It
recentNews.significance: Thiel sale is 2% of holdings, pre-arranged 10b5-1 plan. Not a fundamental weakness signal

analystOpinions.notableComment: Mizuho reiterates $195 Outperform. 16 analysts median target $202.5 (Quiver Quant). Thiel sale is 10b5-1 plan, fundamentally irrelevant

risks.title: Extreme Valuation: P/E 225.8x
risks.description: 5x software sector avg (45x). Motley Fool: need 489% earnings growth to justify 50x P/E. All positives already priced in

risks.title: Oil $100+, Macro Tech Selloff
risks.description: Houthi involvement, oil $100+, inflation reignition. Even defense beneficiary cannot escape high-valuation tech selloff

risks.title: Below 50-day and 200-day MA, Technical Weakness
risks.description: Below 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169). Wyckoff analysis sees $135-140 support

risks.title: Insider Selling: Thiel + Executives
risks.description: Peter Thiel $290M (2M shares) + executive selling throughout March. 10b5-1 plan but sentiment impact

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% annually. Ongoing SBC dilution concern

buyReasons.title: Golden Dome Core Developer + Mizuho $195
buyReasons.rationale: Developing core software for $185B Golden Dome. Mizuho reiterates Outperform. Larger than Maven in scope

buyReasons.title: Defense + Enterprise Dual Tailwind
buyReasons.rationale: Stellantis 5yr renewal (enterprise) + Iran war combat use (defense). Rare dual demand acceleration

buyReasons.title: -30.5% from 52-Week High
buyReasons.rationale: From $207 high. Fundamentals strongest ever with Golden Dome+Maven+Stellantis but price suppressed by macro

buyReasons.title: Institutional Buying Continues
buyReasons.rationale: Czech central bank, UNICOM Systems, Spire Wealth continuing to build positions

overallOpinion: Barchart highlights Golden Dome core role with Mizuho $195 Outperform reaffirmed. Golden Dome is larger than Maven in scope, potentially leading to long-term O&M contracts (Simply Wall St)
TradingKey notes Thiel and executive selling throughout March weighing on sentiment. But Seeking Alpha argues Thiel sale is just 2% of holdings under 10b5-1 plan
P/E 225.8x (5x software sector avg), oil $100+, macro selloff. Fundamentals strongest ever with Golden Dome+Maven+Stellantis but price reflects everything. Hold, small DCA only

investmentVerdict.summary: Golden Dome core developer with Mizuho $195 reaffirmed. Thiel sale (10b5-1) fundamentally irrelevant. But P/E 225.8x and macro headwinds limit near-term upside. Small DCA only

But P/E 225.8x (5x software avg). Thiel selling. Macro pressure.

Consensus $199 (+38%). Hold, small DCA only.
